LANDING.TITLE: Security remediation demos
LANDING.LEAD: These pages demonstrate the mitigation patterns applied to the 11 vulnerabilities identified in the security audit. Each demo isolates one attack vector and shows the safe rendering pattern.

WYSIWYG.TITLE: WYSIWYG editor
WYSIWYG.DESCRIPTION: Stored XSS via report templates. Quill 2 + DOMPurify strip script tags, onerror handlers and javascript: URLs from administrator-authored content.
WYSIWYG.PAGE_LEAD: WYSIWYG editor for regulatory report templates. The output is sanitised through DOMPurify before rendering or persisting — script tags, onerror handlers and javascript: URLs are stripped.
WYSIWYG.INJECTION_WARNING: ⚠ The raw HTML contained at least one injection vector (script, onerror, onload or javascript:). It was stripped in the sanitised output.

PDF.TITLE: PDF report viewer
PDF.DESCRIPTION: URL injection in dynamic iframes. Allowlist regex (HTTPS + host whitelist + .pdf extension) precedes bypassSecurityTrustResourceUrl.
PDF.PAGE_LEAD: URLs are validated against an allowlist regex (HTTPS, host whitelist, /reports/ path, .pdf extension) before being passed to bypassSecurityTrustResourceUrl. Attempts to inject javascript:, data: or arbitrary HTTP origins are rejected.
PDF.INVALID_URL: Invalid report URL. Only HTTPS URLs under /reports/ pointing to a .pdf file are allowed.

DOCUMENTS.TITLE: Document uploads
DOCUMENTS.DESCRIPTION: Stored XSS via filename. Angular interpolation auto-escapes <, > and & — hostile filenames render as literal text.
DOCUMENTS.PAGE_LEAD: Filenames are rendered through Angular interpolation, which automatically escapes <, > and &. The fourth row contains a hostile filename — note that it renders as literal text instead of triggering the embedded onerror handler.

SEARCH.TITLE: Reflected search
SEARCH.DESCRIPTION: Reflected XSS in search header. [innerText] binding renders the query as literal characters, no HTML execution.
SEARCH.PAGE_LEAD: The previous platform reflected the search term in the page header without encoding, enabling reflected XSS. Here the term is bound through Angular interpolation and [innerText] — angle brackets render as literal characters.
SEARCH.FIELD_HINT: Try special characters to verify escaping
SEARCH.NOTE: The script tag is visible as text — it is NOT executed because Angular escaped the < and > characters before insertion.

TABS_CONTENT.TREASURY_DESC: Detailed view of balances per operating account.
TABS_CONTENT.PAYMENTS_DESC: Management of pending transfers and direct debits.
TABS_CONTENT.COMPLIANCE_DESC: Operations flagged for regulatory compliance review.

ERRORS.AMOUNT_RANGE: Min cannot be greater than max
